SEC Clarifies Crypto Interface Rules at Roundtable (April 15, 2026)** | YES | HIGH

signals.headline: Rakuten Integrates XRP for 44M Users (April 14, 2026)** | YES | MED
signals.raw:
Rakuten Integrates XRP for 44M Users (April 14, 2026)** | YES | MED  
Rakuten Wallet enabled XRP conversion to loyalty points in its Rakuten Pay system yesterday, marking major retail utility expansion alongside $119.6M U.S. XRP ETF inflows—the strongest since Dec 2025.[1][3] These developments drive institutional and mainstream demand, though full impact is long-term.[1]
